name: milestone-payment
description: Dispute resolution for milestone-based payment contracts — staged deliverables with payment gates

rules.ruling_template:
Milestone was completed and payment was received.
Both parties fulfilled obligations for this milestone.
No remedy is owed.

rules.condition:
milestone_completed == true AND
payment_received == false AND
days_since_completion > payment_terms_days
rules.ruling_template:
Milestone was completed but payment was not received.
Payment is {days_since_completion} days overdue (terms: {payment_terms_days} days).
Respondent is in material breach of payment terms.

Milestone was not completed but payment is being demanded.
No payment is owed until milestone criteria are met.

Milestone is {milestone_progress_pct}% complete.
Quality disputes on partial work require evidence review.
Recommend partial payment proportional to completed work.

Whether milestone was completed is disputed.
Evidence is insufficient to determine completion status.
Recommend escalation with technical review.
